LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION AND TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED FROM AUGUST 1, 2016 TO AUGUST 11, 2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. IT IS DETERMINED THAT THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT REQUEST THIS MATTER BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL FILE A NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND SUPPORTING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES HUNTER, CSR #6576, BUS. TEL: 530-339-5023. (D302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION & COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 18, 2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302, BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC.'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION AND COMPEL ARBITRATION IS STAYED. THE PARTIES AGREE THAT A MEDIATION (SET FOR AUGUST 26, 2016) IS A PREREQUISITE TO ANY ARBITRATION. AS A MATTER OF LAW AND JUDICIAL EFFICIENCY, ALL PROCEEDINGS IN THIS CASE - INCLUDING THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION - ARE THUS STAYED UNTIL AFTER THE MEDIATION'S COMPLETION. SHOULD THE MEDIATION NOT SETTLE THE MATTER AND SHOULD ANY ISSUE OF ARBITRABILITY REMAIN, THE MOTION MAY BE RE-SET WITHOUT FILING NEW PAPERS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: GENA EALES, CSR 	176, EMAIL: GEALES@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Continued To Dec-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion &Amp; Motion Of Arntz Builders To Stay Action &Amp; Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC.'S Motion To Stay Action And Compel Arbitration is STAYED. The parties agree that a mediation (set for August 26, 2016) is a prerequisite to any arbitration. As a matter of law and judicial efficiency, all proceedings in this case - including the motion to compel arbitration - are thus STAYED until after the mediation's completion. Should the mediation not settle the matter and should any issue of arbitrability remain, the motion may be re-set without filing new papers. Moving party to submit a [proposed] written order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176, email: geales@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion &Amp; Motion Of Arntz Builders To Stay Action &Amp; Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Continued To Aug-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC'S Motion To Stay Action & Compel Arbitration is CONTINUED to August 18, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302, by agreement of the parties.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745, email: lmartinez@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion &Amp; Motion Of Arntz Builders To Stay Action &Amp; Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Continued To Aug-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC'S Motion To Stay Action and to Compel Arbitration is Continued to August 11, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302. It is determined that the moving party did not request this matter be taken off calendar. The moving party shall file a notice of continuance and deliver courtesy copies of the moving and supporting papers to Department 302.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

Notice Of Motion & Motion Of Arntz Builders To Stay Action & Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC.'S Motion To Stay Action & Compel Arbitration is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HK)
